rationale: Both papers explicitly study how consumer demand responses vary with macroeconomic conditions (local unemployment/business cycles in the citing paper; GDP-growth-linked price elasticity cyclicality in the cited paper), and both emphasize cross-segment/category heterogeneity. Given this conceptual overlap and the citing paper’s structural demand focus, the cited JMR article could plausibly be a theory/mechanism or comparison anchor rather than a purely incidental mention. With only bibliography-level DOI evidence and no citation sentence, this pair is not safe to drop.
